case.title: MOHEGAN INTERNATIONAL CORPORATION v. CITY OF NEW YORK

opinion.h1: MOHEGAN INTERNATIONAL CORPORATION v. CITY OF NEW YORK, 366 U.S. 764 (1961)
opinion.h4: MOHEGAN INTERNATIONAL CORPORATION v. CITY OF NEW YORK ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE COURT OF APPEALS OF NEW YORK. No. 902. Decided June 5, 1961.
opinion.p: Leo A. Larkin and Morris L. Heath for appellees.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
MR. JUSTICE DOUGLAS is of the opinion that probable jurisdiction should be noted.
